reasoning: Both models found PKGBUILD/build scripts safe with valid checksums and standard tooling. Qwen's inconclusive verdict stems from a parsing error on misc.ts (type definitions), not actual risk. All reviewed code aligns with legitimate application behavior.
disagreement_analysis: Qwen's inconclusive status was caused by a model parsing error on misc.ts rather than genuine security concerns. Both models otherwise agreed on critical files.
coverage_issues: Neither model reviewed .install hooks (if any exist) - though none are mentioned in reports
Qwen missed review of vault.ts (SRP auth logic) that deepseek analyzed
false_positives: Qwen's 'inconclusive' on misc.ts: Likely type definitions misparsed as suspicious
learnings: Prioritize PKGBUILD/build scripts first to resolve disagreements faster
Improve error handling for model parsing failures in type definition files
Validate coverage of security-sensitive areas like authentication (vault.ts) across all models
